---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for TermMind
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""

---

**Feature:** One-line description of the requested feature.

**Problem:** What problem does this feature solve? What's the current workaround (if any)?

**Proposed solution:** Describe how you'd like this to work. Include any relevant examples or mockups.

**Alternatives considered:** Any other approaches you've thought about?

**Additional context:**
Any other context (e.g., comparisons with other tools, relevant links).
